reason: The text is a common Arabic Islamic phrase meaning 'Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity except Him. On Him I have relied, and He is the Lord of the Great Throne.' It does not express support or encouragement for ISIS activities, violence, or ideology.
original_post: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لا إِلَـهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ - via - 346
